text.title: Earned Value Management Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing Earned Value Management applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Project: acme-platform, period 2026-05. Frozen baselines (v2 after CR-0017). PV = 100,000 USD planned this period. EV = 95,000 USD earned (objective 0/50/100 rule). AC = 105,000 USD actual. CPI = EV/AC = 0.905 (amber). SPI = EV/PV = 0.95 (amber). EAC method: BAC/CPI; BAC = 200,000; EAC = 200,000 / 0.905 = 220,994. Status: amber. Corrective action plan attached: scope freeze, vendor renegotiation. Sponsor escalation NOT required (amber, not red).
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
